item.text: I’m going to trace this strictly through the Orbit graph tools, starting with a symbol search for `RefName` and then resolving exact reference sites with line numbers under `crates/*/src`.
I found the canonical selector for the constructor and next I’ll pull all code references to `RefName::new`, then classify function-value uses vs direct calls.

structured_content.source:
fn parse_ref_name(ref_name: Option<String>) -> Result<Option<RefName>, OrbitError> {
    ref_name
        .filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
        .map(RefName::new)
        .transpose()
        .map_err(|error| OrbitError::InvalidInput(error.to_string()))
}

item.text: I’ve confirmed one function-value site already. I’ll now inspect each referenced production function/module body to classify includes vs direct-call exclusions and compute exact lines.
